title: SCIP+ envelope
description: The extractor-plugin wire contract (issue #16 / #22, ADR-6 / ADR-7). A subprocess plugin reads {root, files} JSON on stdin and prints exactly this envelope on stdout. `scip` is a scip.Index in proto3 canonical JSON (standards-compliant base layer); `ext` is the librarian-specific sidecar and is the source of truth for retrieval signals (edge kinds, unresolved refs, testblocks). See docs/plugin-protocol.md and docs/scip-design.md §4.

scip.description: A scip.Index message in proto3 canonical JSON. Schema: scip.proto (github.com/scip-code/scip). Validated by the protobuf binding, not by this JSON Schema — described here as an opaque object on purpose. The base layer is a lossy, standards-compliant projection; edge kinds / unresolved / testblock-as-first-class do not survive it (that is what `ext` carries).

ext.description: Delta on top of base SCIP, never a restatement of it. Future revisions add fields only; consumers ignore unknown fields.

version.description: ext schema version. Distinct from the protocol major reported by --capabilities.

extDocument.description: One source file, mirroring ExtractionResult granularity so Store.replaceFile stays incremental.

relativePath.description: Repo-relative, forward-slash path. Repo-unaware: no repo prefix (the indexer namespaces ids).

symbols.description: Symbols the base layer cannot carry as first-class (currently testblocks only). Ordinary symbols come from base SCIP and are NOT restated here.

edges.description: The edge list — the source of truth for retrieval. All kinds, all edges, including unresolved.

symbol.description: A moniker (SCIP Symbol grammar, docs/scip-design.md §4.2) or a `local N` id scoped to this document (testblocks).

container.description: Enclosing symbol name, or null at file scope.

spanStart.description: 1-based inclusive first line of the definition span.

spanEnd.description: 1-based inclusive last line of the definition span.

from.description: Source moniker (or `local N` for a testblock in this document).

to.description: Target moniker, or null when unresolved (resolved=false).

toName.description: Referenced name as written, kept even when unresolved.

resolved.description: false keeps the raw name with to=null (completeness-over-precision; base SCIP cannot express this).
